functions.name: addK6
functions.description: Adds a Grafana k6 container resource to the application model. The default image is and the tag is .
functions.signature: addK6(name: string, enableBrowserExtensions?: boolean, port?: number): K6Resource

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

parameters.name: enableBrowserExtensions
parameters.description: Enables browser automation and end-to-end web testing to k6.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The host port to bind the underlying container to.

functions.name: primaryEndpoint
functions.description: Gets the primary endpoint for the Grafana k6 instance. This endpoint is used for all API calls over HTTP.

functions.name: withK6OtlpEnvironment
functions.description: Set K6 environment variables from the existing OTEL environment set for this resource. See https://grafana.com/docs/k6/latest/results-output/real-time/opentelemetry/#configuration.

functions.name: withScript
functions.description: Runs a k6 JS script when starting the Grafana k6 container resource.
functions.signature: withScript(scriptPath: string, virtualUsers?: number, duration?: string): K6Resource

parameters.name: scriptPath
parameters.description: The path to the JS script to run.

parameters.name: virtualUsers
parameters.description: The number of virtual users for the test. Defaults to `10`.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: The duration of the test. Defaults to `30s`.

handleTypes.name: K6Resource
handleTypes.description: A resource that represents a Grafana k6 instance

capabilities.name: primaryEndpoint

parameters.name: scriptPath
